note: Ratcheted baselines (mandate S11 / Article V). Each moves in one direction only: better. Loosening requires a decision record and is itself a finding. Enforced by the checks named. | v2.0: Track C baselines added (provenance drift, egress hosts, trifecta legs).

mutation_score.blocks: release below floor or on un-appliable mutant

required_tests.blocks: release on any fail or golden-hash drift

prod_credentials.blocks: any secret idiom in served source

provenance_drift.blocks: any unattested change to a shipped component (C-37)

undeclared_egress_hosts.blocks: any egress/link host outside the allowlist (C-08/C-28)

trifecta_three_leg_sessions.blocks: any served session holding all three lethal-trifecta legs (C-08)

trackC_no_evidence.blocks: security_scope_audited=true while any Track C check is NO-EVIDENCE
